title: Omni Clip Plan
description: Per-scene summary of clip-level structure and packing strategy. References source scene_beat_plan and dialogue_beats; describes how source beats are packed into Kling-duration shots. Computed by deterministic rhythm-aware packer; not authored manually. Schema version 0.x-draft pending packer feedback.

schema_version.description: Pre-1.0 draft. Promoted to 1.0 after A5/B6 feedback loop closes.

source_scene_beat_plan_ref.description: Relative path to source scene_beat_plan.yaml that defines semantic source beats.

source_dialogue_beats_ref.description: Relative path to source dialogue_beats.yaml that maps dialogue lines to beats and speakers.

clip_summaries.description: Array of clip summaries (not full manifests; those are omni_clip_manifest.yaml per clip).

clip_id.description: Unique identifier for this clip within the scene (e.g., CLIP_SC0001_01).

clip_manifest_ref.description: Relative path to the omni_clip_manifest.yaml for this clip (e.g., planning/scenes/SC0001/manifests/CLIP_SC0001_01_manifest.yaml).

total_duration_seconds.description: Total duration of all shots in this clip (cached summary; authoritative value in manifest).

source_beat_count.description: Count of distinct source beats packed into this clip (for planning visibility).

packing_strategy.description: Summary of packing strategy used by deterministic rhythm-aware packer.

packer_version.description: Version of packing algorithm used (e.g., rhythm_aware_v1, for reproducibility).

packing_mode.description: rhythm_aware_constrained: hard constraints only; rhythm_aware_soft_constraints: includes soft-cost preferences.

cut_point_preference_order.description: Order of cut-point preferences applied as soft constraints (e.g., location_transition, dialogue_exchange_end, silence).

notes.description: Optional notes on packing strategy, constraints applied, or deviations from soft preferences.

created_by.description: User or agent (e.g., omni_clip_planner.py) that created this plan.
